title: Add Inquiry Form with WhatsApp Integration

requirements.summary: Build out the InquiryForm component with all required fields and WhatsApp submission functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Form renders with all specified fields including the system size dropdown.
Submitting the form opens a new tab with a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +917838867880.
The WhatsApp message includes all filled-in form field values in a readable format.
Form has basic client-side validation (Full Name and Phone Number are required).
Form styling matches the solar amber/charcoal theme used across the site.

file_operations.description: Implement the InquiryForm component with form fields (Full Name, Phone Number, Email optional, City/Location, System Size dropdown with options: 1-3 kW, 3-5 kW, 5-10 kW, 10+ kW, and Message/Query). Add client-side validation requiring Full Name and Phone Number. On submit, construct a WhatsApp URL (https://wa.me/917838867880?text=...) with URL-encoded form data and open it in a new tab using window.open. Style the form using Tailwind CSS classes consistent with the solar amber/charcoal palette defined in frontend/tailwind.config.js. Use a section wrapper with id='inquiry' for smooth scroll anchor support.

requirements.summary: Wire the InquiryForm section into App.tsx and add navigation link in Header
acceptanceCriteria: InquiryForm is rendered in App.tsx between Services and BankFinanceBanner.
The section has an id anchor so it can be scrolled to from the header nav.
The Header nav contains a link that smoothly scrolls to the inquiry form.

file_operations.description: Import and render the InquiryForm component between the Services section and the BankFinanceBanner section. The InquiryForm component already provides the id='inquiry' anchor for smooth scrolling.

Add a new navigation link labeled 'Get Quote' or 'Inquiry' to the nav links array in the Header component. This link should point to '#inquiry' to enable smooth scrolling to the InquiryForm section. Ensure the link is added to both the desktop nav and the mobile menu.
